events.reasoning: Starting WATCHER A0
Talk to Neow

Neow options: [0] Upgrade a card, [1] Random common relic, [2] Take 21 damage + choose rare card, [3] Lose Pure Water + random boss relic. Pure Water gives Miracle at start of each combat (+1E). Losing it for boss relic is the strongest option usually. Boss relics are game-defining. But risky - could get something bad. Option [2] rare card for 21 damage: 72-21=51 HP. Could get key cards like Lesson Learned, Vault, Omniscience, etc. But 21 damage is steep. Option [0] Upgrade: safe, Eruption+ is always good (1E instead of 2E). Option [1] Random common relic: could be decent. I think boss relic swap is strongest. Common boss relics for Watcher include Runic Pyramid (incredibly strong), Snecko Eye (risky), etc. Last run Runic Pyramid was amazing. Lets go boss relic swap.

Run 213 Watcher A0. Empty Cage relic, 8-card deck (2 Strike, 4 Defend, Eruption, Vigilance). No Pure Water = no Miracle. Boss: Hexaghost. Map: F1 Monster x=1 or x=4. x=1 leads to Shop at F2 (nice for early buys). x=4 leads to Monster at F2 then more options. I prefer the x=1 path for Shop access. Route: F1 Monster x=1 -> F2 Shop x=1 -> F3 Monster x=1 -> F4 Monster x=1 -> F5 Monster x=1 -> F6 Rest x=2. This gives me fights for gold and cards, then shop, then rest before elites area. Lets go.
